title: Resolution Adopting the Inter-agency Task Force for Ncov 2019 Resolution No. 2020-01 Dated March 13,2020 ?resolution to Postpone All Scheduled Barangay Assembly Until May 2020 or Until Further Notice As Precautionary Measure Against the Current Situation Regarding the Ncov 2019.? (AUTHOR: HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 03/16/2020)
